title: Pet Photo Shoot Call Sheet
text:
## Pet Photo Shoot Call Sheet

**Theme:** {adjective} family portrait with {number} props.

**Violet:** Tortie head cat, photographed first in the {place} sunbeam with {food}.

**Matilda:** Dark red golden retriever, positioned near the {color} {object}.

**Zebby:** Black kitten, scheduled for a {adjective} close-up if he does not {verb} Violet.

**Baby Bear:** Baby bear, wears the {clothing item} and may {verb} {adverb}.

**Photographer note:** If anyone starts {verb ending in -ing}, make a {sound} and offer a {adjective} treat.
